Lesson 16 Summary Guide
 #1 priority is to positively influence the people on your list
 The headline is the most important element in sales copy and
traditional marketing
 The headline in emails is the:
o From line
o Subject line
 Don’t put your company name in the “From Line” – people like
to buy from people, not companies:
o Use your own name (Example: Jeff Walker)
 Rules about the subject line:
o #1 rule is: “Don’t Be Boring” – be interesting and
engaging
o Curiosity headlines are effective
o First part of the subject line is most important (that is what
is visible in Gmail)
 Split test emails with Profollow.com:
o Select “Split Test” instead of email broadcast message in
profollow.com
o Able to split test up to four different email messages
 25%, 25%, 25%, 25%

-- 1 of 2 --

2
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
o Create four different versions
 Test four different subject lines to evaluate open
rates
o Consider testing subject line, body copy, link copy and
time of day
o You will be far more effective when you test
 Know that YOU are not your market – need to test to find out
what the market will respond to
 Great strategy - email your smallest list with your split test,
evaluate results over a few hours and then take the winner and
run it to your BIG list
 Email structure:
o Offer variety – write long and short emails
o Keep paragraphs short, concise and easy to read
o Give people white space in your emails and they will read
it more effectively
o Build links right into the flow of the email
o Remember to be “Can Spam” compliant
 Disclaimer text at the bottom of your email
 Unsubscribe link (built into Profollow.com)
 Physical address
